mapper.sql: id, recipient_employee_id, notification_type, title, content, related_business_type, related_business_id, event_id, read_at, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM personal_notification WHERE recipient_employee_id = #{recipientEmployeeId} AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE personal_notification SET read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE recipient_employee_id = #{recipientEmployeeId} AND read_at IS NULL
